summary: Testing iteration 8: Tested Favorites API, Collaboration Requests, and Portfolio Photos. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI verified - Favorites page, creator profile buttons, and portfolio sections all functioning.

notes.note: Returns 403 'Abonnement requis pour contacter les créateurs' - subscription is required as expected per agent note

passed_tests: GET /api/favorites - Returns list of 2 favorites (Test Creator, Vice Pomsky)
GET /api/favorites/check/{creator_id} - Returns is_favorite=true for favorited creator
POST /api/favorites/{creator_id} - Successfully adds creator to favorites
DELETE /api/favorites/{creator_id} - Successfully removes creator from favorites
GET /api/creators/{user_id} - Returns portfolio_photos (3 photos for Vice Pomsky)
GET /api/creators/{user_id} - All expected fields present (name, bio, city, portfolio_videos, portfolio_photos, min_rate, available)
UI: Sidebar has 'Mes Favoris' link pointing to /business/favorites
UI: MyFavoritesPage shows 2 creators with remove buttons, view profile, contact buttons
UI: Creator profile page shows toggle-favorite-btn with correct state
UI: Creator profile page shows main-cta-btn 'Demander une collaboration'
UI: Creator profile page shows share-profile-btn
UI: 'Portfolio photos' section visible on creator profile with 3 photos
UI: 'Réalisations vidéo' section visible with 3 videos
UI: Collaboration dialog shows Budget estimé* as required field
UI: Submit button disabled when budget not selected
UI: Favorite toggle shows toast notification and updates visual state
critical_code_review_comments: Collaboration request requires active business subscription - this is by design
Portfolio photos are correctly fetched from user collection and merged into creator profile
Favorites API properly supports add/remove/list/check operations
seed_data_creation: Used existing creator Vice Pomsky (user_b81a38acae93) with 3 portfolio_photos for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Favorites and Portfolio features fully tested. Collaboration requests require subscription (403 if not subscribed). Vice Pomsky has portfolio_photos added. Business user testbusiness@emergent.org has 2 creators in favorites.

features_verified.favorite_toggle_button: Heart button on profile toggles favorite state ✅
features_verified.collaboration_form_budget: Budget field marked as required (*), submit disabled without it ✅
features_verified.collaboration_sends_message: Could not fully test due to subscription requirement

known_limitations.collaboration_request: Requires active business subscription - testbusiness@emergent.org does not have one, so full collaboration flow cannot be tested
